comment: DRAFT: Anthropic MCP Registry submission for @solvela/mcp-server. Do NOT submit — user triggers submission after private testing. Current timestamp for reference only.
_submission_note: VERIFY BEFORE SUBMITTING: (1) 'escrowContractAddress' is a custom field not in the standard MCP Registry schema — confirm Anthropic accepts or ignores unknown fields before POSTing. (2) Verify the current MCP Registry endpoint and schema at api.anthropic.com/mcp-registry/v0/servers. Extra fields may be silently dropped or reject the submission.
name: solvela
description: Pay-per-call LLM access via x402 protocol on Solana. One-line install for Claude Code, Cursor, and Claude Desktop. Real USDC-SPL settlement with trustless escrow.

tools.name: chat
tools.description: Send a prompt to your chosen LLM provider via x402 payment on Solana. Returns streamed completion with real-time payment signature.

tools.name: smart_chat
tools.description: Route a prompt through Solvela's 15-dimension smart router to pick the best model for the task (economy, auto, premium, or free tier).

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List available LLM models and their per-token pricing across 5 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, DeepSeek).

tools.name: wallet_status
tools.description: Check your wallet balance, session spending, and escrow status.

tools.name: spending
tools.description: View cumulative spending for the current session with budget enforcement.

tools.name: deposit_escrow
tools.description: Deposit USDC-SPL into Solvela's trustless escrow for pay-only-for-what-you-receive guarantees. Optional; gated behind SOLVELA_ESCROW_MODE=enabled.

requiredEnvironmentVariables.name: SOLANA_WALLET_KEY
requiredEnvironmentVariables.description: Your Solana wallet's base58-encoded private key. Never commit to repos. Used to sign x402 transactions. Supports escrow or direct-transfer signing modes.

requiredEnvironmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL
requiredEnvironmentVariables.description: Solana RPC endpoint (e.g., https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com). Required when payment signing is enabled.

optionalEnvironmentVariables.name: SOLVELA_SESSION_BUDGET
optionalEnvironmentVariables.description: Max USDC to spend in this session. Default: unlimited.

optionalEnvironmentVariables.name: SOLVELA_SIGNING_MODE
optionalEnvironmentVariables.description: Payment signing mode: 'auto' (escrow-preferred, fallback direct), 'escrow' (escrow-only), 'direct' (direct transfer), 'off' (demo mode, no payment). Default: auto.

optionalEnvironmentVariables.name: SOLVELA_ESCROW_MODE
optionalEnvironmentVariables.description: Enable the deposit_escrow tool. Default: disabled.

optionalEnvironmentVariables.name: SOLVELA_MAX_ESCROW_DEPOSIT
optionalEnvironmentVariables.description: Max USDC per deposit_escrow call. Default: $5.00.

optionalEnvironmentVariables.name: SOLVELA_MAX_ESCROW_SESSION
optionalEnvironmentVariables.description: Max cumulative escrow deposits per session. Default: $20.00.

pricing.description: Transparent per-call USDC-SPL settlement. No account required. Escrow-first — pay only for what you receive.

security.keyManagement: Keys stored locally, never sent to Solvela. Signing happens client-side.
security.escrowAudit: Deployed to mainnet with 21-test suite covering deposit/claim/refund/timeout paths. Third-party audit not yet commissioned — planned before public escrow promotion.

notes: DRAFT ONLY. Not for submission. Research Anthropic's current MCP Registry endpoint (api.anthropic.com/mcp-registry/v0/servers) and exact schema before posting. This document captures the required fields; final POST may require additional metadata.
